title: Triage Board Example
subtitle: Create a keyboard-operable ticket triage board.

sections.heading: Triage Board in use
sections.body: This editor demo gives the textarea meaningful triage-board data and shows the board shape a user would expect to export.

cards.title: Needs design review
cards.body: Light-mode gallery spacing and click targets need visual confirmation.

cards.title: Ready to land
cards.body: Schema change allows local card hrefs and rejects remote card links.

cards.title: Blocked
cards.body: Browser evidence must be refreshed after regeneration.

sections.heading: Editable triage payload
sections.body: Edit the JSON, export it, and copy it into an issue or handoff note.

cards.title: Needs design review
cards.body: Confirm gallery surfaces are white and cards are visibly actionable.

cards.title: Ready to land
cards.body: Renderer tests pass with all template fixtures.

cards.title: Blocked
cards.body: No blocker in this demo payload.
